title: crataegus iracunda var. stolonifera
intro: Crataegus iracunda var. stolonifera, also known as stolon-bearing hawthorn, is a specific variety of the hawthorn plant species, characterized by its unique ability to propagate through underground stolons. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating cardiovascular issues such as high blood pressure and heart failure, due to its high content of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs). The health benefits of Crataegus iracunda var. stolonifera include improved cardiovascular function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tea, tincture, and capsules, are commonly used to support heart health and promote overall well-being.
